title: Learning Lab Agreement — Eligibility and Participation
content: A person deploying AI in Utah may enter either a Regulatory Mitigation Agreement (RMA) — which waives specified law in exchange for safeguards, data sharing, and disclosures — or a Joint Interpretation Agreement (JIA) — which clarifies how existing statute applies to a specific AI use without waiver. Agreements run for an initial twelve months with up to two twelve-month extensions, counterparties include OAIP plus the relevant state agency (or judiciary, higher-ed, or political subdivision under HB 320), and participants must satisfy five statutory eligibility prongs.
